title: Flavorful Italian Green Olive Pasta
description: A salty, shattering, crowd-pleaser Italian dish featuring green olives, cooked to perfection in a donabe vessel, suitable for ovo-vegetarian diets. This nimono-simmered pasta is a classic Italian recipe with a twist.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a donabe vessel, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the minced garlic until fragrant.
Add the chopped onion to the donabe and cook until translucent.
Add the pitted green olives to the donabe and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the mixture nimono-simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the grated parmesan and beaten egg to create a creamy sauce.
Add the cooked pasta to the donabe and toss everything together until the pasta is well coated with the sauce.
Season the pasta with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the pasta hot, garnished with additional grated parmesan if desired.
